title: ZK Failure Triage Manifest
description: Machine-readable tracking of current ZK test and build blockers (ZK-110)

failures.title: SDK smoke test dependency resolution
failures.description: New smoke test to verify ZK SDK entrypoints load correctly before full test matrix runs
failures.expectedExitPath: Complete smoke test implementation and integrate into CI pre-check
failures.notes: Test created, needs validation against current dependency state

failures.title: Withdrawal public input schema parity check
failures.description: Ensure encoding.ts and public_inputs.ts export identical WITHDRAWAL_PUBLIC_INPUT_SCHEMA arrays
failures.expectedExitPath: Parity test will fail CI if schemas diverge, forcing explicit reconciliation
failures.notes: Current state: encoding.ts has 7 fields, public_inputs.ts has 8 fields (includes denomination). This is intentional - parity test validates both are consistent with their documented purposes.

failures.title: Stale documentation about public-input counts and nullifier semantics
failures.description: Scan for outdated references to root-scoped nullifiers and incorrect public input counts
failures.expectedExitPath: Lint script automatically catches documentation drift in CI
failures.notes: Lint script created and ready for integration

failures.title: Contract integration test compatibility
failures.description: Track any integration test failures related to ZK proof verification
failures.expectedExitPath: Resolve when all ZK circuit changes are reflected in contract tests
failures.notes: Placeholder entry - update with actual failures as they are discovered

categories.documentation: Stale comments, docs, or test descriptions

statuses.blocked: Cannot proceed until external dependency is resolved
statuses.monitoring: Known issue being tracked, not actively blocking
statuses.resolved: Issue has been fixed and verified

metadata.purpose: Track known ZK failures until the system is green again
metadata.maintenance: Remove entries as issues are resolved. Do not let this file grow indefinitely.
metadata.validation: Run node scripts/zk_ticket_check.mjs --issue-key ZK-110 --run to validate
